title: Rename device - new name on the Support device list
scenario: Renamed Poly Bluetooth device name is not reflected in the Support device list under Menu > Support
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on the device name to enter Device Settings.
Tap on the device name field to rename the device.
Enter a new name for the device and confirm/save.
Tap Menu (hamburger icon or three-dot menu).
Observe the device name listed under the Support device list.
expected: The new device name is displayed in the Support device list under Menu > Support.
